evals.prompt: What are the key features of Oracle AI Database 26ai? Give me the main differences from the previous 23ai version.
evals.expected_output: Answer listing AI Database 26ai features with proper source citations in [N] format. Should mention: Long-term support, AI Vector Search inclusion, agentic AI capabilities, no additional cost for advanced features.

evals.prompt: I need to compare OCI pricing with AWS. How much cheaper is OCI in terms of compute, storage, and networking?
evals.expected_output: Specific pricing comparison data with citations. Should mention: compute 50% cheaper, block storage 70% cheaper, networking 80% cheaper.

evals.prompt: Add this Oracle press release to the facts notebook: https://www.oracle.com/news/announcement/oracle-ai-database-26ai-launches/
evals.expected_output: Confirmation that the URL has been added to the notebook. Should indicate success and brief explanation of what will happen next (processing, indexing).
